title: Saddle Bags
description: Changes the chest texture on Mules, Donkeys, and Llamas to something more realistic and actually fits with the mobs.
body: # **Saddle Bags** ![saddle bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b437caea6d5d044680ddbb49d114462a0b9b131.png) **Tired of how the chest looks on donkey's, mule's and llama's! This pack replaced the chest with a more realistic and authentic saddle bag.**
